节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage application accounts.

注释信息: @returns { AppAccountManager } Returns the instance of the AppAccountManager.
节点.return_description: Returns the instance of the AppAccountManager.

节点.功能描述: Provides methods for managing application accounts.

Adds the account name and extra information of this application to the account management service.

Only the owner of the application account has the permission to call this method.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates the name of the application account to add.

parameters.说明: Indicates the name of the application account to add.

节点.功能描述:
Adds the account name and extra information of this application to the account management service.

Only the owner of the application account has the permission to call this method. The extra information cannot be sensitive information of the application account.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates the name of the application account to add.
@param { string } extraInfo - Indicates the extra information of the application account to add.

parameters.说明: Indicates the name of the application account to add.
Indicates the extra information of the application account to add.

节点.功能描述:
Adds the account name and extra information of this application to the account management service.

Only the owner of the application account has the permission to call this method. The extra information cannot be sensitive information of the application account.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates the name of the application account to add.
@param { string } [extraInfo] - Indicates the extra information of the application account to add.
@returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the function.

parameters.说明: Indicates the name of the application account to add.
string } [extraInfo] - Indicates the extra information of the application account to add.

节点.return_description: The promise returned by the function.

节点.功能描述:
Creates the account name and extra information of this application to the account management service.

Only the owner of the application account has the permission to call this method.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates the name of the application account to add.
@throws { BusinessError } 12300007 - The number of accounts reaches the upper limit.

parameters.说明: Indicates the name of the application account to add.

error_codes.description: The number of accounts reaches the upper limit.

节点.功能描述:
Creates the account name and extra information of this application to the account management service.

Only the owner of the application account has the permission to call this method. The extra information cannot be sensitive information of the application account.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates the name of the application account to add.
@param { CreateAccountOptions } options - Indicates the extra information of the application account to add.
@throws { BusinessError } 12300007 - The number of accounts reaches the upper limit.

注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates the name of the application account to add.

节点.功能描述: Adds an application account of a specified owner implicitly.
注释信息: @param { string } owner - Indicates the account owner of your application or third-party applications.
@param { string } authType - Indicates the authentication type.
@param { object } options - Indicates the authenticator-specific options for the request.
@param { AuthenticatorCallback } callback - Indicates the authenticator callback.

parameters.说明: Indicates the account owner of your application or third-party applications.
Indicates the authenticator-specific options for the request.
